zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Courcy於大約1107年出生在英國奧可福爾努聶哈姆 庫尼時，他的父親Robert de Courcy38歲，母親Rohais Grandmesnil37歲。他和Matilda d'Avranches至少有2個女兒。他去世於1162年之前在英國戴文奧可哈普頓，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾維蒙達哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Courcy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphonse, Andree, Jacques, Michel, Monique.
French: habitational name from any of the places in Calvados, Loiret, Manche, and Marne called Courcy.
History: Nicolas Lemière dit Courcy from Courcy in Manche, France, married Louise-Geneviève Dubé in Rivière-Ouelle, QC, in 1749.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Courcy was born about 1107, in Nuneham Courtenay, Oxfordshire, England, his father, Robert de Courcy, was 38 and his mother, Rohais Grandmesnil, was 37. He had at least 2 daughters with Matilda d'Avranches. He died before 1162, in Okehampton, Devon, England, and was buried in Wymondham, Leicestershire, England.

fr.Courtenay, Departement du Loiret, Centre: Courtenay, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Courcy est né environ 1107, à Nuneham Courtenay, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Courcy, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Rohais Grandmesnil, avait 37 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 filles avec Matilda d'Avranches. Il est décédé avant 1162, à Okehampton, Devon, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Wymondham, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

de.Courtenay, Departement du Loiret, Centre: Courtenay, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als William de Courcy um 1107 in Nuneham Courtenay, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Courcy 38 und seine Mutter Rohais Grandmesnil 37. Er hatte mit Matilda d'Avranches mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 1162 in Okehampton, Devon, England und wurde in Wymondham, Leicestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Courcy è nato il circa 1107 nel Nuneham Courtenay, Oxfordshire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Courcy, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Rohais Grandmesnil, aveva 37 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figlie con Matilda d'Avranches. Morì prima del 1162, nel Okehampton, Devon, England, e fu sepolto a Wymondham, Leicestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Courcyが約1107年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアヌネハム コウルテナイで生まれた時，父Robert de Courcyは38歳，母Rohais Grandmesnilは37歳であった。彼はMatilda d'Avranchesとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1162年以前にイギリスデボンオケハンプトンで死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアウイモンドハムにて埋葬された。

ko.Courtenay, Departement du Loiret, Centre: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 쿠르텐아이
ko.lifeSummary: William de Courcy(이)가 대략 1107년 영국 스퍼드실르 누니함 쿠르텐아이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Courcy(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Rohais Grandmesnil(은)는 37세였다. 그는 Matilda d'Avranches(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1162년 이전 영국 데폰 오케함프턴에서 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 윈이몽함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Courcy nasceu aproximadamente 1107, em Nuneham Courtenay, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Courcy, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Rohais Grandmesnil, tinha 37 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Matilda d'Avranches. Ele faleceu antes 1162, em Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Wymondham, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.Courtenay, Departement du Loiret, Centre: коуртенеи, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Courcy родился около 1107 г. в местности нунэам коуртенеи, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Courcy было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Rohais Grandmesnil, 37. У него было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Matilda d'Avranches. Он умер перед 1162 г. в местности окэамптон, девон, Англия и был похоронен в местности вимондхам, лисестиршир, Англия.
